title: NG31 8HZ, Moy Park Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/DP3430GB/V006
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Moy Park Limited Installation name: Grantham Poultry Processing Plant Permit number: EPR/DP3430GB/V006  "
